description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a predominantly black and yellow color scheme. The body is constructed with a robust black receiver and barrel assembly, complemented by yellow accents on the magazine, pistol grip, and foregrip. It is equipped with a collapsible stock for adjustable length and improved ergonomics, and a detachable box magazine for rapid reloading. The rifle includes a top-mounted Picatinny rail for accessory attachment and standard iron sights for aiming. A suppressor is attached to the muzzle, reducing noise and muzzle flash, making it suitable for urban operations.
description: A modern black and yellow tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, iron sights, and a suppressor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor and the alignment of the barrel, with the iron sight visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the collapsible stock, yellow magazine, pistol grip, and the full length of the suppressor.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the straight alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
